inputs.label: Current Savings
inputs.businessContext: Initial amount already saved. Standard financial planning input.

inputs.label: Monthly Contribution
inputs.businessContext: Amount saved each month. Common in personal finance and retirement planning.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual return on savings. Based on historical market averages (e.g., S&P 500 ~7-10% nominal).

inputs.label: Number of Years
inputs.businessContext: Time horizon for savings goal. Standard input for time value of money calculations.

inputs.label: Goal Amount
inputs.businessContext: Target savings amount. User-defined financial objective.

inputs.label: Compounding Frequency
inputs.businessContext: How often interest is compounded. Affects future value; monthly is common for savings accounts.

inputs.label: Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual inflation. Adjusts goal to real terms; typical central bank target ~2%.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: User's confidence in input estimates. Adjusts output for risk; low confidence applies a discount.

thresholds.annualInterestRate > 20: Warning: Unrealistically high interest rate; verify input.
thresholds.inflationRate > 10: Warning: High inflation; consider adjusting goal.
thresholds.goalAmount / (currentSavings + monthlyCo: Warning: Goal may be unrealistic given inputs.

formulas.futureValue: currentSavings * (1 + effectiveAnnualRate / n)^(n * years) + monthlyContribution * ((1 + effectiveAnnualRate / n)^(n * years) - 1) / (effectiveAnnualRate / n)
formulas.requiredMonthlyContribution: if goalMet then 0 else (goalAmount - currentSavings * (1 + effectiveAnnualRate / n)^(n * years)) * (effectiveAnnualRate / n) / ((1 + effectiveAnnualRate / n)^(n * years) - 1)

hiddenLossDrivers: if inflationRate > 5 then 'Inflation erodes purchasing power'
if annualInterestRate < 3 then 'Low interest rate may not beat inflation'
if monthlyContribution == 0 and currentSavings == 0 then 'No savings input'
suggestedActions: if not goalMet then 'Increase monthly contribution to ' + requiredMonthlyContribution.toFixed(2)
if inflationRate > 3 then 'Adjust goal for inflation'
